message:
Add mermaid terminal renderer with scale adaptation

New mermaid_render.rs module (~1200 lines, 32 tests):
- Unicode/ASCII glyph palettes with box-drawing characters
- Viewport mapping (world-space to cell coordinates)
- Node, edge, cluster rendering with label truncation
- Line junction merging (tee/cross intersection detection)
- Dashed/thick edge style detection from arrow syntax
- Scale adaptation with fidelity tiers (Rich/Normal/Compact/Outline)
- Density-based automatic tier selection
- Legend area reservation for footnote regions
- render_diagram_adaptive() convenience API

Closes bd-12o4t (Terminal Renderer) and bd-u4fgt (Scale Adaptation).
Unblocks 18+ downstream mermaid diagram beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
